concepts.finding: YOLO reframes object detection as a single regression problem, directly predicting bounding boxes and class probabilities from full images in one evaluation, achieving 45 FPS with 63.4 mAP on VOC2007.
concepts.implication: Unified end-to-end models that bypass multi-stage pipelines can dramatically reduce latency while maintaining accuracy, directly transferable to real-time query intent classification.
concepts.open_question: Can a similar unified architecture predict query intent directly from raw query text without separate retrieval/ranking stages?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: A unified end-to-end query intent classifier will achieve lower latency than a multi-stage pipeline while maintaining within 5% of its accuracy.
